deterministic.engagement_rationale: 8 signals in the last 30 days from 3 contacts.

llm_produced.narrative: Engagement at Driftwood Labs is medium, with 8 signals over the past 30 days from 3 contacts, though product activity is driven almost entirely by Alex Davis. Sentiment is mixed: on the positive side, Alex Davis has been actively deepening adoption — connecting integrations on 2026-05-01 and 2026-05-02, executing a plan change to enterprise on 2026-05-03, uploading a file on 2026-05-05, and inviting a new team member on 2026-05-08. However, Riley Anderson raised two unresolved technical blockers — multi-region data residency ('Performance issues,' 2026-04-21) and webhook retry with exponential backoff ('Re: integration setup,' 2026-04-24) — and Jordan Wilson requested CSV export capability ('Support ticket response,' 2026-04-24), with no visible responses to any of these requests in the window. The gap between growing product investment and multiple unanswered blockers is the central risk: if Riley Anderson's infrastructure concerns remain unaddressed, the expansion momentum Alex Davis is driving could stall.
